/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_ofh_ethernet.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/ethernet_factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/ethernet_frame_builder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/ethernet_transmitter_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/ethernet_receiver_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/ethernet_rx_buffer_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/vlan_ethernet_frame_builder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_ethernet.dir/vlan_ethernet_frame_decoder_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_ofh_ethernet.a
